options.name: -ApplicationName
options.description: This is a dynamic parameter made available by the WSMan provider. The WSMan provider and this parameter are only available on Windows.

options.name: -Authentication
options.description: This is a dynamic parameter made available by the WSMan provider. The WSMan provider and this parameter are only available on Windows.

options.name: -CertificateThumbprint
options.description: This is a dynamic parameter made available by the WSMan provider. The WSMan provider and this parameter are only available on Windows.

options.name: -ConnectionURI
options.description: This is a dynamic parameter made available by the WSMan provider. The WSMan provider and this parameter are only available on Windows.

options.name: -Force
options.description: Forces this cmdlet to create an item that writes over an existing read-only item. Implementation varies from provider to provider. Even using the Force parameter, the cmdlet can't override security restrictions.

name: -ItemType
-Type
options.description: Specifies the provider-specified type of the new item. The available values of this parameter depend on the current provider you are using.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies the name of the new item. You can specify the name of the new item in the Name or Path parameter value, and you can specify the path of the new item in Name or Path value. Items names passed using the Name parameter are created relative to the value of the Path parameter.

options.name: -Options
options.description: This is a dynamic parameter made available by the Alias provider. For more information, see New-Alias (../Microsoft.PowerShell.Utility/New-Alias.md).

name: -OptionSet
-OS
options.description: This is a dynamic parameter made available by the WSMan provider. The WSMan provider and this parameter are only available on Windows.

options.name: -Path
options.description: Specifies the path of the location of the new item. The default is the current location when Path is omitted. You can specify the name of the new item in Name , or include it in Path . Items names passed using the Name parameter are created relative to the value of the Path parameter.

options.name: -Port
options.description: This is a dynamic parameter made available by the WSMan provider. The WSMan provider and this parameter are only available on Windows.

name: -SessionOption
-SO
options.description: This is a dynamic parameter made available by the WSMan provider. The WSMan provider and this parameter are only available on Windows.

options.name: -UseSSL
options.description: This is a dynamic parameter made available by the WSMan provider. The WSMan provider and this parameter are only available on Windows.

name: -Value
-Target
options.description: Specifies the value of the new item. You can also pipe a value to `New-Item`.

name: -Confirm
-cf
options.description: Prompts you for confirmation before running the cmdlet.

name: -WhatIf
-wi
options.description: Shows what would happen if the cmdlet runs. The cmdlet isn't run.
